evals.prompt: My components folder is a mess. Can you help me reorganize src/components into functional groups?
evals.expected_output: Runs detect_component_context.py and build_component_reorg_plan.py, produces a conservative plan respecting existing layout signals, and treats keep-put as intentional.

evals.prompt: Audit my Next.js app/components directory and suggest a reorganization plan.
evals.expected_output: Detects Next.js App Router context, proposes functional subfolders only for components with clear naming signals, keeps hooks/tests/stories in place unless co-location already exists.

evals.prompt: Can you just move all my components into folders right now?
evals.expected_output: Explains this skill is planner-only, does not move files, and directs the user to component-reorg-executor for approved plans.
